hero.subtitle: Healthier, More Effective
hero.description: We provide local solutions to nutritional challenges and actively contribute to the development of transportation and logistics in the Democratic Republic of Congo and the region.

about.title: About Olidor sarl
about.p1: Olidor Sarl is a company committed to the production, processing, marketing and distribution of nutritional and agri-food inputs, as well as the provision of vehicle rental, transport and logistics services.
about.p2: With local expertise and an innovative approach, Olidor has established itself as a key player in meeting the varied needs of households, humanitarian organizations and companies in the region.
